chapter_title.en: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not

text: 821 - وَقَالَ اَلنَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: «اَلْفَرْقُ بَيْنَ اَلْمُسْلِمِينَ وَ اَلْمُشْرِكِينَ اَلتَّلَحِّي بِالْعَمَائِمِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.821 - The Prophet, said: "The distinction between the Muslims and the polytheists is the wearing of turbans."
